[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000001101 3
1 000000100 1
2 001001000 2
3 000010100 2
4 001101000 3
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 010011000 3

01 10 010011000 3 match 7
12 21 010100100 3
23 32 001000100 2
34 43 000000100 1 match 1
45 54 000000000 a match 5 6
56 65 100001000 2
67 76 000011000 2
70 07 000011000 2

13 31 000001101 3 match 0
24 42 000000100 1 match 1

46 64 000010100 2 match 3
57 75 001101000 3 match 4

71 17 000111011 5
